data.title: American Express Shows Bullish Signals Ahead Of Q3 Earnings, But Analysts Hold Back
data.description: American Express is up 84.29% in a year, but analysts see 7% downside with a neutral rating and $228.60 price target.

data.title: What's Going On With Marvell Technology (MRVL) Stock?
data.description: Marvell Technology shares surged 4% pre-market Thursday. The stock rose with Taiwan Semiconductor but has since leveled off.
